summary: Reached flow-verified proof for the Write note to Home task promotion path on clean mirrored main by exercising the running app end to end: promote from Write, confirm Task Created/Show status in Write, follow Show into Home, open the promoted task, use View source note, and return to the original Write note.

contract_status_changes.contract: Write note to Home task promotion flow proof
contract_status_changes.before: Implemented and domain-tested with running-app-smoke available, but no end-to-end flow proof on clean mirrored main
contract_status_changes.after: Flow-verified in the running simulator app from Write promotion through Home source-note route-back

contract_status_changes.contract: Write Show route to Home task
contract_status_changes.before: Domain-tested highlight route from Write into Home task destination
contract_status_changes.after: Flow-verified: Write shows Task Created/Show, Show opens Home with the promoted task highlighted, and the routed task leads back to the original Write note through View source note

residual_risks: The flow proof ran only on iPhone 16 simulator; no real-device or TestFlight confirmation exists yet.
The slice captured screenshots during the flow, but it did not add durable screenshot-regression automation or a screenshot-verified contract gate.
Today and Home protocol promotion paths were not exercised in this proof slice.
recommended_next_reason: Stop after the requested flow proof slice; any higher-proof or adjacent UI automation follow-up should be queued deliberately.
